issues.description: Missing condition for 'total cost of your Characters is 5 or more'. Current condition only checks for attached DON; does not verify character cost threshold.

ReturnToHand action is present but incomplete: missing conditional logic. The action should only execute IF the flipped Life card meets criteria (Supernovas type, cost ≤5). Currently structured as unconditional sequence.
Missing PlayFromHand action. After revealing a qualifying card, the effect allows playing it. Current DSL only FlipLife without subsequent play action.
Card filtering logic absent. The FlipLife action should include a filter condition: card must be type {Supernovas} AND cost ≤5. No type/cost validation present.
